summary: Key findings for meta-prediction on Mamdani mayoral CP exceeding 91% on Sept 24
content:
Post 39935: Will CP > 91% on Sept 24 for "Will Mamdani be elected Mayor of NYC in 2025?"

Underlying question (post 38665): 133 forecasters, CP not available (AIB tournament)
Meta question (post 39935): 84 forecasters, closes Sept 16, resolves Sept 24

Key facts:
- Mamdani won Dem primary June 24, 2025 (upset over Cuomo)
- General election Nov 4, 2025
- Emerson poll Sept 7-8: Mamdani 43%, Cuomo 28%, Sliwa 10%, Adams 7% (15-pt lead)
- Quinnipiac poll Sept 13: Mamdani leads by 22 points
- NYC overwhelmingly Democratic (~7:1 registration advantage)
- Previous meta-question (post 39229) asked if CP > 90% on Aug 29

Complicating factors:
- 4-way race with Cuomo as serious independent
- Mamdani is democratic socialist (further left than typical)
- But polling leads are very large (15-22 points)

Estimated CP range: 88-94%, median ~91-92%
P(CP > 91%): ~62%
